# Tokenia
> Free LLM token calculator for AI developers worldwide. Privacy-first, browser-based, no signup required.

## What it does
- Counts tokens for 30+ AI models including GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, Claude Opus/Sonnet/Haiku, Gemini 2.5, Llama 3, Mistral, DeepSeek
- Estimates API costs in USD per request and at scale (monthly projection)
- Side-by-side model comparison with Best Value badge
- Token Visualizer: shows text colored by tokens for visual understanding
- Prompt Optimizer: detects filler words and estimates token savings
- File upload support: PDF, DOCX, TXT, CSV, JSON, code files (browser-parsed, never uploaded)
- Export results as CSV or Markdown
- 100% private: all processing happens in browser, no data ever leaves the user's device

## Languages
Available in 5 languages: English (en), Spanish (es), Portuguese Brazil (pt), Chinese (zh), German (de)

## Free Public API
Endpoint: POST https://tokenia.live/api/v1/count
Rate limit: 100 requests/hour per IP, no authentication required
Request: {"text": "your text here", "provider": "openai"} (provider is optional)
Response: {"tokens": 1250, "chars": 5000, "words": 820, "results": [...]}

## Key pages
- Home / Token Analyzer: https://tokenia.live
- API Documentation: https://tokenia.live/api-docs.html
- Security & Privacy: https://tokenia.live/security.html
- Status: https://tokenia.live/status.html
- Blog: https://tokenia.live/blog
- Embed Widget: https://tokenia.live/embed.html
- OpenAPI Spec: https://tokenia.live/openapi.yaml
- Changelog: https://tokenia.live/changelog.html

## Pricing
100% free forever. No signup required. No credit card. No tracking cookies.

## Technology
- Frontend: Vanilla JS, Inter font, CSS custom properties
- Backend: Node.js / Express on Railway
- Auth: Supabase (optional, for history saving)
- Token counting: Client-side heuristic (~4 chars/token); server-enhanced exact counts via tiktoken for OpenAI models
- Privacy: No analytics cookies, IP hashed (non-reversible) for deduplication only

## Contact
Email: info@tokenia.live
Made in El Salvador 🇸🇻

## Model pricing data (May 2026)
OpenAI GPT-4.1: $2.00/$8.00 per 1M tokens (input/output)
OpenAI GPT-4o: $2.50/$10.00 per 1M tokens
OpenAI GPT-4o mini: $0.15/$0.60 per 1M tokens
Anthropic Claude Opus 4.6: $15.00/$75.00 per 1M tokens
Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6: $3.00/$15.00 per 1M tokens
Anthropic Claude Haiku 4.5: $0.80/$4.00 per 1M tokens
Google Gemini 2.5 Pro: $1.25/$10.00 per 1M tokens
Google Gemini 2.5 Flash: $0.15/$0.60 per 1M tokens
Google Gemini 2.0 Flash: $0.10/$0.40 per 1M tokens
DeepSeek V3: $0.27/$1.10 per 1M tokens
DeepSeek V3 Flash: $0.07/$0.28 per 1M tokens
Meta Llama 3.3 70B: $0.59/$0.79 per 1M tokens
Mistral Large 2: $2.00/$6.00 per 1M tokens
Mistral Small 3: $0.10/$0.30 per 1M tokens
